series_metadata.series_description: All records pertaining to contracts including, but not limited to, RFPs, evaluations, contracts for goods or services, amendments and modifications, supporting documentation, reports, correspondence, and other records filed with and related to the contract.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: five (5) years expiration date or termination of contract, or unsuccessful proposals/bids two (2) years contract award date ; Paper: period specified electronic format
